Leicester Space Week
Programme Forum Partners Contact

A citywide celebration of space

Leicester Space Week

A one-week programme showcasing Leicester as a hub for space innovation, sustainability, public engagement, and future careers.

Explore the Forum Become a Partner

Who it is for

Businesses

Connect with space data, innovation, and sector partnerships.

Students

Explore careers, skills, and routes into the space sector.

Public

Enjoy talks, exhibitions, and hands-on events across the city.

Partners

Collaborate across academia, government, culture, and industry.

Featured events

Businesses and sector partners

Cosmic Coffee

An informal morning networking event at Space Park Leicester.

Find out more

Public and families

Space Lates

An evening public event at the National Space Centre.

Find out more

Businesses, academia, government

Space Impact Forum

A 3-day professional forum on innovation, skills, and sustainability.

Find out more

Startups, students, makers

Hackathon

A 24-48 hour challenge to build space-enabled solutions.

Find out more

Why Leicester

Built on heritage, research, and real space capability

Leicester has over 60 years of space heritage, a world-leading research base, and Space Park Leicester as a live hub for collaboration, enterprise, and skills.

Timeline

Planning

Partners, venues, and brand confirmed.

Recruitment

Speakers, sponsors, schools, artists, and abstract calls.

Promotion

Website, registration, and media campaign launch.

Delivery

Event week runs citywide with impact reporting after.

Partners

University of Leicester, Space Park Leicester, National Space Centre, National Space Academy, Leicester City Council, and sector partners.

FAQ

Who can attend?

The week is designed for businesses, students, families, researchers, and the wider public.

Is it accessible?

Each venue page should include access details, step-free info, and support arrangements.

Can I sponsor?

Yes. Partner and sponsor opportunities are available across the week and for individual events.

Get involved in Leicester Space Week

Join as a partner, sponsor, speaker, exhibitor, volunteer, or attendee.

Contact us Partner with us

Celebrating Leicester’s space heritage, innovation ecosystem, and future skills pipeline.
